info.name: School Management API
info.description: Collection for the School Management API — Add School & List Schools endpoints.

variable.description: Change to your deployed host when testing against production.

request.description: Add a new school. All four fields are required.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Demonstrates validation errors for empty name and out-of-range latitude.

response.name: 400 Bad Request

request.description: Returns all schools sorted by distance (km) from the given coordinates.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Omitting latitude/longitude returns a validation error.

response.name: 400 Bad Request
